Searching /40_projects for that structured identifier found exactly one project reference, in 40_projects/2026_04_18_dockflow_exception_radar/README.MD. Reading that canonical project record showed status `active`, not SIMMERING, so the count of SIMMERING projects involving Omar Haddad is 0.
